text: Dost ki shaadi miss ho gayi kyunki bedridden sasur ji ki seva se itni thakan thi, par asli wajah meri depression ki goliyaan hain jo main sabse chhupa kar rakhti hoon. Agar joint family mein kisi ko pata chala toh saas kahegi ki bahu 'natak' kar rahi hai aur khandaan ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Main bas 'kamzori' ka bahana banakar chup rehti hoon taaki ghar ka mahaul kharab na ho.

Main shaadi mein nahi ja saki aur sabko laga ki main thak gayi hoon, par andar se main poori tarah toot chuki hoon aur apni bimari ka naam lene se bhi darti hoon. Main apni antidepressants ki strip cupboard ke peeche chhupati hoon taaki pati ko dukh na ho aur sasural mein kalesh na shuru ho jaye. Parivaar ki shanti ke liye main apni mental health ko 'thakan' ka naam dekar sabke samne muskurati rehti hoon.

Bacchon ka pressure aur career gap ka dukh itna hai ki mera dum ghutta hai, par doctor se li hui depression ki prescription maine phaar kar phenk di taaki Mummy ji na dekh lein. Shaadi attend na kar paane par sabne taane diye, par maine kuch nahi kaha kyunki ghar ki 'bahu' ko har haal mein samajota karna padta hai. Main nahi chahti ki meri wajah se Papa ki parvarish par koi sawal uthaye ya 'log kya kahenge' wali baat ho.

Caregiving burnout ne mujhe itna nichod diya hai ki main bed se uth nahi paayi, par sabko yahi bola ki mausam badalne se 'bukhar' chadha hai. Main depression word use nahi kar sakti kyunki parivaar mein ise pagalpan mana jata hai aur main ghar ki izzat bachane ke liye ye bojh akele utha rahi hoon. Rishton mein doori na aaye, isiliye main apni goliyaan andhere mein chup-chap kha leti hoon.

Shaadi miss hone par jab sabne poocha toh maine bas sar dard ka bahana kiya, kyunki main nahi chahti ki unhe pata chale ki main dimaagi taur par bimar hoon. Joint family mein rehne ka matlab hai ki aap kabhi apne liye stand nahi le sakte, warna saas-bahu ka jhagda poore samaj mein mashhoor ho jayega. Main apni pehchaan aur apna dard dono daba rahi hoon taaki mere bacchon ko koi 'ajeeb' maa ka taana na mare.
